examples: AIM To investigate zinc (Zn2+ ) modulation of glycine (Gly)-activated whole-cell currents in acutely dissociated rat sacral dorsal commissural nucleus (SDCN) neurons.
Objective To Study the distribution of primary afferent fibers of the sciatic and pelvic nerves in the dorsal commissural nucleus (DCN) of the rat lumbosacral spinal cord.
The firing rates and patterns of neuronal activity in the anterior commissural nucleus (ACN) were studied on in vitro hypothalamic slices using electrophysiological techniques.
